lessons.title: Database mocking for demo/POC environments
lessons.issue: Tests failed with database connection timeout in demo environment without real database
lessons.solution: Implemented mock database operations that return success values instead of executing real queries
lessons.impact: Enables test code validation in demo/POC environments without infrastructure dependencies

lessons.title: Environment vs code logic error distinction
lessons.issue: All tests failed with 404 - API endpoints don't exist
lessons.solution: Skip healing for environment issues (404, 500, connection errors). Only heal code logic errors (element not found, assertion failed)
lessons.impact: Prevents wasted healing attempts on infrastructure issues that code changes cannot fix
